title: Integration test secretx-gcp-sm against real GCP Secret Manager
description:
Run the live integration tests for the gcp-sm backend against a real GCP project. Tests exist but have never been run against a live service.

**Why:** The gcp-sm backend is published but unverified. Response shape, binary secret handling, and the GCP_ACCESS_TOKEN token-expiry behavior are untested.

**Setup required:**
1. GCP project (free tier; billing may need enabling)
2. Enable Secret Manager API in the project
3. Create one secret with at least one version
4. gcloud auth login && gcloud auth print-access-token

**Run with:**
SECRETX_GCP_TEST=1 GCP_ACCESS_TOKEN=$(gcloud auth print-access-token) GCP_PROJECT=my-project GCP_SECRET_NAME=my-secret cargo test -p secretx-gcp-sm

Note: token expires after 1 hour.

**Acceptance:** All integration tests pass. Update beads memory and the integration test status table in README.md.
